articles.title: Canadian Dollar gathers strength amid doubts over US-Iran ceasefire

articles.title: EUR/USD softens to near 1.1750 amid extended US‑Iran ceasefire
articles.expand: The EUR/USD pair trades in negative territory near 1.1750 during the early Asian session on Wednesday. The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran, as well as uncertainty surrounding the Strait of Hormuz blockade, weighs on the Euro (EUR) against the US Dollar (USD).
